title: lankesterella orthantha
intro: Lankesterella orthantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in the treatment of various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lankesterella orthantha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using it as a topical treatment for skin irritations and wounds.
